concepts.name: Node
concepts.short_definition: A fundamental building block of a linked list, containing data and a reference to the next node.

concepts.name: Singly Linked List
concepts.short_definition: A linear data structure where elements are linked sequentially using pointers, with each node pointing to the next.

concepts.name: Head Pointer
concepts.short_definition: A reference to the first node in the linked list.

concepts.name: Tail Pointer
concepts.short_definition: A reference to the last node in the linked list.

concepts.name: Traversal
concepts.short_definition: The process of visiting each node in the linked list sequentially.

concepts.name: Insertion
concepts.short_definition: The operation of adding a new node to the linked list at a specified position.

concepts.name: Deletion
concepts.short_definition: The operation of removing a node from the linked list.

concepts.name: Search
concepts.short_definition: The operation of locating a specific node within the linked list.

concepts.name: Empty List
concepts.short_definition: A linked list that contains no nodes.

concepts.name: Next Pointer
concepts.short_definition: The reference within a node that points to the subsequent node in the sequence.
